/usr/lib64/ccache/c++ -fPIC -g -shared -Wl,-soname,libfawkesrobotmemory.so -o /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkesrobotmemory.so CMakeFiles/fawkesrobotmemory.dir/robot_memory_inifin.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkesrobotmemory.dir/robot_memory_aspect.cpp.o  -lLinearMath -lm -L/usr/lib64 -lBulletSoftBody -lBulletDynamics -lBulletCollision -lLinearMath -L/usr/lib64 -lmongocxx -lbsoncxx -lm -lBulletSoftBody -lBulletDynamics -lBulletCollision -lmongocxx -lbsoncxx
